name: google-chat
description: Read spaces and send messages in Google Chat

tools.name: List Spaces
tools.description: List Google Chat spaces (rooms and direct messages) the authenticated user is a member of

pageToken.description: Page token from a previous list call

filter.description: Filter by space type, e.g. spaceType = "SPACE" or spaceType = "DIRECT_MESSAGE"

historicalSummary.omitted: space details and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Space
tools.description: Get details of a Google Chat space

spaceId.description: Space ID — the part after 'spaces/' in the space resource name (e.g. AAAAAAAAAAA)

tools.name: List Messages
tools.description: List messages in a Google Chat space, including messages in threads

spaceId.description: Space ID — the part after 'spaces/' in the space resource name

pageToken.description: Page token from a previous list call

orderBy.description: Sort order: createTime ASC or createTime DESC

historicalSummary.omitted: cards, annotations, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Message
tools.description: Get details of a specific Google Chat message

spaceId.description: Space ID — the part after 'spaces/' in the space resource name

messageId.description: Message ID — the part after 'messages/' in the message resource name

tools.name: Send Message
tools.description: Send a text message to a Google Chat space

spaceId.description: Space ID — the part after 'spaces/' in the space resource name

messageReplyOption.description: Set to REPLY_MESSAGE_FALLBACK_TO_NEW_THREAD to reply in a thread when body.thread is provided

text.description: Plain-text message body (supports Google Chat markup)

thread.description: Optional thread to reply to, e.g. { "name": "spaces/AAA/threads/BBB" }

prompts.title: Catch up on a space
prompts.prompt: List my Google Chat spaces, then summarize the most recent messages in the most active one.

prompts.title: Send a message
prompts.prompt: Send a status update message to a Google Chat space of my choice.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Google Chat API Setup

steps.title: Create a Google Cloud project
steps.description: Go to https://console.cloud.google.com/ and create (or select) a project. Any Google Workspace account can be used for testing; Chat API requires a Workspace account (consumer @gmail.com accounts cannot use Google Chat spaces).

steps.title: Configure the OAuth consent screen and Chat app
steps.description: Under APIs & Services → OAuth consent screen, configure the app and add the scopes chat.spaces.readonly and chat.messages. The Chat API also requires a Chat app configuration: visit https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/api/chat.googleapis.com/hangouts-chat and set an app name, avatar, and description.

steps.title: Create OAuth credentials
steps.description: Under APIs & Services → Credentials, create an OAuth client ID (Web application) with redirect URI <your-app-url>/api/auth/google-chat/callback. Set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET in your .env.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Spaces tool, then List Messages on one of the returned spaces.

notes: Google Chat user authentication requires a Google Workspace account — consumer Gmail accounts will get 403s
Space and message IDs are resource-name segments: spaces/{spaceId} and spaces/{spaceId}/messages/{messageId}
The chat.messages scope covers listing, reading, and sending messages; chat.spaces.readonly covers space discovery
